creator: cyclaero@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 180155
Diff file of the changes in the clone's port directory

I released the new version 1.0.7 of my File Tree Cloning tool 'clone'. It brings some fixes and one added option:

- improved check for path intersection.
- fixed a memory leak.
- added option to create a cloned directory tree containing hard links to the original content.
- adaptions for the ARM architecture.
- exclude list was ignored in the case of destination items for whose the respective source item did not exist.

The new port version absolved the following test sequence without any problems:

1.  make stage
2.  make check-orphans
3.  make package
4.  make install
5.  make deinstall
6.  pkg add work/pkg/clone-1.0.7.txz
6.1 pkg delete clone-1.0.7
7.1 make clean
7.2 make
7.3 chown -R rolf work
7.4 sudo -u rolf make package
8.  make distclean

Best regards

Rolf
